problem_text_cn: 1037 质量分别为$m_1、m_2$的两个质点构成的系统，试证在其质心系中的动能为$\frac{1}{2}\mu\Delta \boldsymbol{v}\cdot\Delta \boldsymbol{v}$，式中$\mu$为两质点的约化质量，$\Delta \boldsymbol{v}$为两质点的相对速度。
problem_text_en: 1037 For a system composed of two particles with masses $m_1$ and $m_2$, prove that the kinetic energy in its center-of-mass frame is $\frac{1}{2}\mu\Delta \boldsymbol{v}\cdot\Delta \boldsymbol{v}$, where $\mu$ is the reduced mass of the two particles and $\Delta \boldsymbol{v}$ is the relative velocity of the two particles.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】质心系中**总动量为零**，即$m_1\boldsymbol{v_1}+m_2\boldsymbol{v_2}=0$，可得相对速度$\Delta \boldsymbol{v}=\boldsymbol{v_2}-\boldsymbol{v_1}=-\frac{m_1+m_2}{m_2}\boldsymbol{v_1}$。将系统动能用$\boldsymbol{v_1}$表示，代入约化质量$\mu=\frac{m_1m_2}{m_1+m_2}$，化简后即可得证。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】In the center-of-mass frame, the total momentum is zero, i.e., $m_1\boldsymbol{v_1}+m_2\boldsymbol{v_2}=0$, so the relative velocity is $\Delta \boldsymbol{v}=\boldsymbol{v_2}-\boldsymbol{v_1}=-\frac{m_1+m_2}{m_2}\boldsymbol{v_1}$. Express the kinetic energy of the system in terms of $\boldsymbol{v_1}$, substitute the reduced mass $\mu=\frac{m_1m_2}{m_1+m_2}$, and simplify to prove the formula.
problem_answer: 证明见解析，质心系动能公式$\boldsymbol{E_k=\dfrac{1}{2}\mu\Delta \boldsymbol{v}\cdot\Delta \boldsymbol{v}}$成立，其中$\boldsymbol{\mu=\dfrac{m_1m_2}{m_1+m_2}}$
